title: Geepas Hand Blender | Food Collection Hand Blender, Soup Mixer with Stainless Steel Blades | Ideal for Smoothies Shakes Vegetables Baby Food Soup | Anti-Splash | 2 Year Warranty, Black, 180W (Black)
features: ✅ CREATE IDEAL CONSISTENCY - This hand blender comes with perfect 180W power which fits you’re blending requirements. Great for blending dairy products, fruits, vegetables, sauces, soups, shakes, baby food and more.

✅ DETACHABLE STICK, EASY CLEANING - The stick is made of sturdy food grade, high strength ABS plastic material with durable 100% copper motor with Low noise DC motor and can be removed easily. Removable parts can be cleaned easily and convenient for minimal storage space.

✅ INJECTION SHELL, BLEND IT ALL - Ergonomic grip for easy blending and anti-splash guard for those messy meals! One speed turbo for blending smoothies, health drinks, dips, sauces and desserts in less time and for the whole family to enjoy.

✅ ANTI SPLASH STAINLESS STEEL BLADES - High-quality stainless steel blades of this handheld/stick blender allow for easy, efficient blending and reduce suction. Start blending the easy way - simply with one touch! Whether you puree, mix or chop, the blade processes your ingredients thoroughly.
description: Product Description 180W POWER Perfect 180W Hand Blender delivers smooth blending performance, ideal for everyday kitchen needs. EASY CLEANING Compact design with removable parts, easy to clean and store, perfect for convenient everyday use. BLEND LIKE A PRO Perfectly designed hand blender that fits all your grinding needs, ensuring smooth blends every time. QUICK & SIMPLE TO USE One-speed turbo blender whips smoothies, sauces, dips & desserts fast—perfect for healthy family treats. LOW NOISE OPERATION Durable 100% copper motor with low-noise DC design, easily removable for long-lasting performance. STAINLESS STEEL BLADES High-quality stainless steel blades ensure smooth, efficient blending with less suction in this stick blender. SINGLE SPEED BUTTON Ergonomic handle with easy push buttons ensures comfortable grip and effortless operation. DETACHABLE STICK Removable food-grade ABS plastic stick, durable, sturdy & easy to clean for safe everyday use.
